definition_en: A formal document proposing actions to solve an issue.
definition_es: Documento formal que propone acciones para resolver un tema.

definition_en: A meeting where delegates discuss and negotiate informally.
definition_es: Reunión informal donde los delegados discuten y negocian.

definition_en: A request to correct a procedural mistake.
definition_es: Solicitud para corregir un error de procedimiento.
